title: Peppery Quick Adventurous Ukrainian Fajita Tagine
description: A bold and spicy Ukrainian-inspired dish featuring fajita seasoning, served in a traditional tagine pot with a crispy cheese pull. Serve with warm pita bread or over couscous.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large tagine pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the fajita seasoning, chicken broth, and red wine vinegar. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the cottage cheese, shredded mozzarella cheese, and chopped fresh dill. Simmer for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the Peppery Quick Adventurous Ukrainian Fajita Tagine hot, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
